properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Great in splendor Lord of everything Worthy is Your name Never changing Ever reigning King Worthy is Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All creation rises up To declare Your wonders As people everywhere sing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praises To the One who saves us Through His blood He gave us life And now we come Everyone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than able Always faithful Friend Worthy is Your name Bright and burning You're returning again Worthy is Your name
